steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $20$, so the answer is D, $20$. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Substitute x = -4 into h(x) = 5|x|
steps.content: We substitute $x = -4$ into the function definition: $$h(-4) = 5|-4|$$

steps.title: Evaluate the absolute value and simplify
steps.content: The absolute value of $-4$ is $4$. Therefore: $$h(-4) = 5 \cdot 4 = 20$$ The negative input becomes positive before multiplying by $5$. That confirms D is correct.
